title: signoff-{timestamp}.json — final design sign-off contract
description: Emitted by the HITL gate 4 (task 036) when the client approves the user-flows viewer. Orchestrator watches for this file + recomputes screensManifestHash + visualReviewReportHash + uiKitVersion and rejects if any drift is detected.
x-feat-023: Optional `coverageWarnings` field added per feat-023. When the /pm stage's brief-coverage gate surfaces deferred capabilities (especially core ones), the orchestrator (or a regenerated signoff) records them here so the human sees them before greenlighting Mode B. Older signoff files without this field remain valid.

clientName.description: Non-empty client identifier — company, person, or stakeholder name.

approved.description: If false, pipeline halts for revisions; a new sign-off is required after changes.

comments.description: Free-text reviewer notes; may be empty string.

screensApproved.description: Count of screens sealed by this sign-off; MUST equal the count in docs/screens-manifest.json at orchestrator-validation time.

screensManifestHash.description: SHA-256 of docs/screens-manifest.json (the canonical {path, sha256} sorted list). Drifts if any screen HTML was edited post-sign-off.

visualReviewReportHash.description: SHA-256 of docs/visual-review/report.json. Binds the visual-review state to this sign-off — re-running /visual-review after sign-off invalidates it.

uiKitVersion.description: Semver of packages/ui-kit at sign-off time. Orchestrator rejects if packages/ui-kit/package.json.version differs — sign-off is bound to a specific kit release.

coverageWarnings.description: OPTIONAL (feat-023). Surfaced deferrals from the brief-coverage gate at /pm stage. Each entry corresponds to a brief §11/§12 capability the PM agent (or human) chose to defer. Core-category deferrals here mean the human accepted the gap before Mode B started; absence of this field is valid for older signoffs (additive change).
